titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 120: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 120. (A.R. No. 434 of 1918.) TIRUKKARUGĀVŪR, SHIYALI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine Vēḷviḍainātha temple.

Records that Semban Aruḷan-Uttamanidhi alias Uttamachōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷār constructed in stone the temple of Tiruveḷḷaḍai Mahādēvar in Tirukkurugāvūr in Tiruvāli-nāḍu. He also endowed 1 vēli, 3 mā, 3 kāṇi of land for the maintenance of nine persons for playing musical instruments during the three services of the sandhis, of ardhayāma and paḷḷi-eḻuchchi in the same temple. An additional one mā and kāṇi of dry land was also given towards the same paḷḷi-eḻuchchi service. Śivakāmi Dharmmapriyaṉ figures as a signatory.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 326.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu
10 3 patiṉmuṉṟāvatu tiruvālināṭṭu tirukkurukāvūrt tiruveḷ
ḷaṭai mahādevarkku cempan Aruḷannuttamaniti
yāṉa Uttamacoḻamuventaveḷār tirukkaṟṟaḷi Iṭṭu
Ittevarkku vaitta śrīpali koṭṭakkaṭava Ivvūr śrītaraṉāṉa
pāṅkāṇaiyākiya Añūṟṟuvaveḷāṉ Āḷ muṉṟum Ivaṉ ma
kaḷ veṭṭu sitrataṉam peṟṟuṭaiya tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭu kaḻani vāyil mātar
civaṉ māṇikkaṉ kāṭanākiya Uttamanitip perukaccaṉāḷ nālum
Ivaiññūṟṟuva veḷāṉ makaḷaiyeveṭṭu sītrataṉam peṟṟuṭaiya U
ṇi ketta nāḷ ḷiraṇṭumāka Āḷoṉpatu Ivvo
ṉpatāḷuṅ koṇṭu trikāla muṉṟucantiyum Ardayāmum
paḷḷiyeḻucciyuṅ koṭṭak kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ivarkaḷukku ceytu kuṭutta
nilamāvatu nam Ivūr melaiiṭaip puṉcey tevatāṉatte perumāḷ vati
kku vaṭakku veliye muṉṟumā mukkāṇi Ivveliye muṉṟumā mukkā
ṇi nilamum koṇṭu candrātittavaṟ koṭṭakaṭavārkaḷāka ceytu kuṭutteṉ ce
mpiyaṉ Aruḷaṉ ṉuttamanitiyākiya Uttamacoḻa muventa veḷāneṉ civa
kāmi dharmmapriyaṉ neḻuttu Ivarkaḷukke Iṭṭa puncey
yile paḷḷiyeḻucci Iṭṭa
nilam varippaṭi maṭakku Oru mākā
ṇi .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
